preferences.summary: Keep experiment notes close to the active iteration.
preferences.detail: Iteration-local implementation notes are the source of truth for this canary.

constraints.summary: Do not let repo-wide bootstrap changes drift away from the active iteration instructions.
constraints.detail: Promote this constraint before shared docs or scripts are edited.

promotion_candidates.summary: Promote the bootstrap-alignment constraint for shared docs and scripts.
promotion_candidates.detail: Project-wide work must explicitly consume this constraint.
promotion_candidates.rationale: This is the only cross-scope dependency in the canary.
